failure_modes.cause: BPR set to 5.0 bar, but required is 9991.7 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Upgrade BPR to handle pressures up to 10000 bar

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: High flow rate and small diameter lead to high dP
failure_modes.mitigation: Optimize flow rate and reactor diameter to reduce dP

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test upgraded BPR at 10000 bar with solvent to ensure stability
Measure pressure drop across reactor at various flow rates to validate dP calculations
